mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: recurrent urinary tract infections, abnormal renal collecting system morphology, elevated immunoglobulin levels
hepatomegaly, splenomegaly, neurological symptoms (vertigo, difficulty walking)
joint hypermobility, skin fragility, easy bruising (purpura), intestinal involvement
increased total eosinophil count, recurrent bacterial infections, impairment of neuromuscular transmission
epilepsy, facial angiofibromas, renal cysts, kidney angiomyolipomas
pheochromocytoma, medullary thyroid carcinoma, Marfanoid habitus (long legs, arachnodactyly)
progressive muscle weakness, enlarged heart (hemopericardium or chylopericardium), respiratory insufficiency
